title: No hacking
note: No hacked clients, X-ray, or unfair modifications.

title: No duping
note: Item duplication and exploits are banned.

title: No autoclickers
note: Clicking must be done by hand — no macros.

title: No running into spawn in combat
note: You cannot escape a fight by fleeing to the safe zone.

title: Be respectful
note: Treat everyone with respect. No toxicity.

title: No lying to staff
note: Always be honest with the team.

title: No racism
note: Zero tolerance for racism or hate speech.

title: No asking for OP or ranks
note: Don't beg staff for operator status or ranks.
